_transport: stdio (ADR-0010 entry point: python -m app.mcp.server) + HTTP Streamable at /mcp/server when MCP_AUTH_TOKEN is set (ADR-0029). Distinct surfaces: stdio used by CliAgentProvider (F17); HTTP used by remote clients (claude.ai). See docs/api/openapi.json GET /mcp/info for live transport/http_enabled state.
_server: backend/app/mcp/server.py (FastMCP synapse). Mounted into FastAPI app at /mcp/server for HTTP (ADR-0029). Introspected by GET /mcp/info (ADR-0027).
_contract_ref: ADR-0010 (transport + write path), ADR-0027 (introspection), ADR-0029 (HTTP mount + auth + remote_write_enabled)

tools.name: search_wiki
tools.description: Search the Synapse wiki. Routes through the same retrieve() pipeline as /search (ADR-0022 + ADR-0030): dense bge-m3/Qdrant Phase 1 when EMBEDDINGS_ENABLED=true (default), or lexical Postgres ILIKE Phase 1 when EMBEDDINGS_ENABLED=false (ADR-0030 §2.3). Graph-expansion Phase 2, token-budget Phase 3, and context-assembly Phase 4 run in both modes. Returns up to k results sorted by relevance score. When exposed over the HTTP surface (ADR-0029, MCP_REMOTE_WRITE_ENABLED irrelevant for reads), this tool is always available to remote clients.

k.description: Maximum number of results to return. Clamped to [1, 50].

outputSchema.description: Empty list on Qdrant/embedding error (no exception propagated).

invariants: I9 — reuses retrieve() + Qdrant/bge-m3 or Postgres (no new search engine); I7 — single bounded pass; degrade when EMBEDDINGS_ENABLED=false (ADR-0030)

tools.name: write_page
tools.description: Create or update a wiki page through the Synapse ingest seam (I1, I5, ADR-0010 §2). Validates frontmatter (type, title, sources[], lang) before writing. Returns a structured error dict (not an exception) on missing/invalid fields so the CLI agent can retry. The write goes through write_wiki_page() — the SAME primitive the orchestrated loop uses — so K5 wikilink parsing, K3 index update, Qdrant upsert, and log.md append all run identically (single write path).

content.description: Markdown body WITHOUT a frontmatter block.

frontmatter.description: Dict with at least {type, title, sources, lang}.

sources.description: Non-empty list of source paths for F3 traceability. Required.

origin_source.description: Optional origin path injected into sources[] for F3 traceability.

oneOf.description: Validation failure: structured error dict (not an exception — AC-MCP-3)

invariants: I1 — reuses write_wiki_page primitive (no direct file write)

tools.name: get_page
tools.description: Retrieve a live wiki page by title. Returns full content and frontmatter on success, or a structured error dict if the page is not found or has been soft-deleted.

tools.name: list_pages
tools.description: List live wiki pages, optionally filtered by page type. Excludes soft-deleted pages (deleted_at IS NOT NULL). Results sorted by title.

type.description: Optional page type filter. null returns all live pages.
